content:
Goal
* The description currently jumps straight into the task without context (e.g. what x positions? what y positions?). Please add the following sentence at the beginning:

You are given some coordinates.

* Please format "x" and "y" as [[variables]].

Input
* Please format "N" as a [[variable]].

* Please reformat [[(x,y)]] as {{(}}[[x]]{{,}}[[y]]{{)}}.

Output
* Please format "x" and "y" as [[variables]].

Constraints
* Please swap the order of the constraints so that they match the order introduced in the Input section.

* Please format "N", "x" and "y" as [[variables]].

Stub generator
* Please add a write statement, e.g. "write answer" or "write x y".

Cases
* Please swap Pair 1 and Pair 2. Since Test 1 is automatically displayed in the Example section, using a single-coordinate case there means the example doesn't showcase a representative scenario of the task (i.e. handling multiple coordinates).

Game modes
* (optional) Consider enabling Fastest and/or Reverse modes too.

Thanks.
